brand_identity.name: Blogs 4 Blocks
brand_identity.tone: Cheerful, Inviting, Global, Exciting, Easy to Navigate

headings.usage: Use for all section titles, hero text, and article headlines. 'Outfit' provides a geometric yet friendly character that fits the 'block' theme.

body.usage: Use for all paragraph text, UI labels, and metadata. readable and modern.

accents.description: Vibrant rainbow palette used for categories, tags, buttons, and borders. Do NOT use these for large background areas unless heavily muted.

textures.grain: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

bento_grid.description: Use for category landing pages and feature highlights.
bento_grid.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 auto-rows-[minmax(180px,auto)] gap-4

masonry.description: Use for blog post feeds to create visual interest.
masonry.implementation: Use column-count CSS or simple grid with different row spans.

buttons.primary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-gray-900 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] hover:translate-y-[-2px] hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] transition-all font-bold px-8 py-3 rounded-full
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-black border-2 border-black hover:bg-gray-50 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:translate-y-[-2px] hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] transition-all font-bold px-8 py-3 rounded-full
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-100 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium

cards.blog_post: group relative bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1
cards.category: relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl p-6 flex flex-col justify-end aspect-square hover:scale-[1.02] transition-transform duration-300

inputs.style: bg-white border-2 border-gray-100 focus:border-black focus:ring-0 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-lg transition-colors placeholder:text-gray-400

image_assets.hero_collage_instruction: Create a CSS grid or absolute positioned layout to overlay these images. Use masks or heavy blurs to ensure text readability if text is placed over them. Ideally, place the images as a border or a subtle background layer.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for main backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle patterns.
Do NOT use standard 'Bootstrap' column layouts. Embrace asymmetry.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states that change color or position.
Use 'Outfit' font for all Headings (h1-h6). Use 'DM Sans' for body.
Do NOT center text by default. Use left align for better readability.
instructions_to_main_agent:
1. Install 'Outfit' and 'DM Sans' from Google Fonts immediately. 
2. Configure Tailwind theme to include the custom colors and fonts defined above. 
3. Build the 'Global City Collage' component first as it's the core visual identity. 
4. Implement the 'Bento Grid' for the categories section. 
5. Use the 'Block Effect' shadow (hard shadow without blur) for buttons and key cards to match the 'Blogs 4 Blocks' theme.
